description: FAR Compliance Monitor — continuous monitoring of Federal Aviation Regulation compliance across all operational areas

hard_stops.label: Compliance Violation Detected
hard_stops.logic: Specific Federal Aviation Regulation not being met by current operations

hard_stops.label: OpSpec Limitation Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Operating outside certificate authority or Operations Specifications limitations

hard_stops.label: Mandatory Report Not Filed
hard_stops.logic: Required regulatory report or filing has not been submitted within the mandated timeframe

soft_flags.label: Compliance Audit Overdue
soft_flags.logic: Internal compliance audit has not been completed within the scheduled cycle

soft_flags.label: Documentation Gap Detected
soft_flags.logic: Required documentation is missing or incomplete for a regulatory area

soft_flags.label: Inspector Inquiry Pending
soft_flags.logic: FAA inspector inquiry or request has been received and awaits response

soft_flags.label: Self-Disclosure Recommended
soft_flags.logic: Potential non-compliance identified that may qualify for voluntary self-disclosure under FAA VDRP
